transcript.clean_text: stage 16 of the tour de france was won by hugo ulla the first canadian winner in 34 years of a stage with jonas vinegar from denmark still in charge of the tour two minutes 22 seconds ahead of today pogaccha the two-time defending champion gary thomas in third omam hormanbaldi had slipped from fourth to ninth with nairo quintana moving up a place we were all set in sagoda for the next day the big day in the mountains on the pyrenees the first of two big mountain stages the final couple of days up on high before the race up to paris called us and then a finish up at perhagood on the famous altiport the runway finished for the third time on this particular tour 130 kilometers with three and a half thousand meters of climbing first proper day in the pyrenees and that 16 gradient inside the final kilometer the next test in the hills for vingagor with everybody looking to take it to him no breakaway in the first 30 kilometers and that meant that while fernat secured the points classification he only has to finish the race now in paris to take home the green jersey when the climbing began the race really did start to split up pino up the road with ludsenko balder trying to get back some of the time he'd lost the day before france was still looking for its first stage win and pino going over the top of the caldespa making sure he'd set a brand new strava record just about holding on to the polka dot jersey at this point and miguel biel doing the domestic turn of his life no raphael michael at the start today so today pogaccha have been down to just a few men three domestics for him one of them getting rid of adam yates tom pidcott also dropped by this point not a great day for the ineos grenadiers 30 k's to go and it was time for brandon mcnulty he too would do the damage uae emirates performing wonderfully well despite the lack of numbers quintana also dropped garrett thomas his place on the podium looking more secure and valde after his first early accelerations struggling to keep pace then the turn of thomas himself thomas on his way to losing time the former winner with another former winner attacking over the top no difference made though today paul gachar with an attack just a few hundred meters from the top of the penultimate climb vinegar able to hold on mcnulty able to return on the descent gary thomas would find some company john balder would be back with him and going on to the final climb of the day still with the american brandon mcnulty setting the pace for pogacha thomas would go off in search with roman balde of a little better fortune and with 5k from the finish the expected attack from pogacha not yet materializing thomas riding his own race and riding very well everybody falling into their gc positions more or less as we were with a couple of exceptions pig dropping out the top 10 and dropping into the final 250 meters the top two mcnulty with wonderful work bulgachar attacking again caught and then coming over the top uae emirates working all day jambo visma isolated but vinegar delivering another second place third stage win of this tour though for today a lot of work for four seconds to get back to 218 i'm sure they'll keep chipping away with garan thomas looking good on the podium but further away now from an assault on the yellow jersey corman valdez moving back up david is set for a first ever top 10 at this tour naido quintana still there are there abouts the two best riders in the race bugatti's explosive finish bringing him the stage a third of this to it we'll gotcha the winner but finishing on the same time as his rival for the yellow jersey who's holding on wonderfully then he goes lead then cut by just the four bonus seconds two minutes 18 going into the final mountain stage with a time trial still to come on saturday thomas now at 4 56 but with a very nice buffer on quintana who sits in fourth godu is up in fifth with balder back up from ninth to sixth simon jessica is still the king of the mountains and is fighting to take home the jersey to germany he has a twelve point lead over yonas vino with tarepogacha down in third the final mounting stage will leave lord and we'll have the riders praying that they can keep their positions the mighty obesque then spawndel a finish up on high at utakam again all the climbing in the second half of the stage once more not the longest 143ks one more big day in the mountains to go and you'll be able to watch it live on gcn plus also on demand after the race
